name: Strawberry Snow (Mansikkalumi)
recipeIngredient: 2 10 oz packag frozen whole strawberries, defrosted & drained
recipeInstructions:
( A Finnish Dessert)
1. With the back of a large spoon, rub the fresh or thoroughly defrosted frozen strawberries through a fine sieve into a small mixing bowl.
2. Stir the puree into the sugar, a little at a time.
3. Using a balloon-type wire whisk, beat the egg whites and salt vigorously in a large bowl (preferably unlined copper) until stiff peaks form when the beater is lifted out of the bowl.
4. Gently fold the strawberry puree using a rubber spatula with an under-over cutting motion.
5. Fold in the whipped cream.
6. Pour into an attractive serving bowl or individual dessert bowls.
7. Decorate with whole strawberries.
8. Serve immediately, or refrigerate for a few hours and serve later in the day.
